title: Hosted Checkout Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for hosted and redirect-based checkout flows where the payment provider controls the entire payment UI. The platform's sole responsibility is redirecting the buyer to the continue_url returned in the escalation response.

available_hosted_checkout_instrument.title: Available Hosted Checkout Instrument
available_hosted_checkout_instrument.description: Declares availability of a hosted checkout instrument. No constraints apply — the payment provider determines payment method availability within its own UI.

id.description: Unique identifier for this instrument instance, assigned by the business.

handler_id.description: The id of the payment handler that produced this instrument. Must match a handler id in the checkout response's payment.handlers array.

type.description: Discriminator value identifying this as a hosted checkout instrument. Used for oneOf resolution in handler schemas.

display_name.description: Human-readable provider name for display in platform UI (e.g., 'Razorpay Magic Checkout', 'PayPal', 'Shop Pay'). Complements the handler's reverse-DNS name which is not user-facing.

display_logo.description: HTTPS URL to the payment provider's logo for display in platform UI. Must be served over HTTPS.

credential.description: Session reference credential. Populated by the business in the Complete Checkout response when returning requires_escalation status. Not present in Create Checkout responses.
